title: Calcryx, the White Matron
description: Face the lost white dragon and learn why it disappeared.
notes:
📍 The party explore the ancient dungeon with [**Meepo**](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/5195096-kobold-warrior) in search of [**Calcryx**](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/5195287-young-white-dragon).

The air is still and cold. A thin layer of ice covers all surfaces.

🎬 A growl echoes through the tunnels, followed by a chill wind. Both repeat every few minutes.

- The **pulsing roots** crack through the ice and become increasingly *thick and knotted*.
- A [**giant spider**](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/4775821-giant-spider) blocks the path, *frozen* mid-escape, facing the exit.

🧩 The roots converge to **a thick subterranean tree** with frost-veined bark and surrounded by ice. *Do not make me hungry.*

- Hanging from the ceiling are **little red fruits**, some scattered across the floor.
- The white dragon appears to be shielding **several smooth pale stones**.

🎲 Paths:
- **Calcryx returns** to the kobolds.
- Meepo **leaves Calcryx** alone.
- Calcryx **attacks** the intruders.

👉 The party uncovers why **Calcryx** vanished and chooses a path forward.

title: The Rootknot Ruckus
description: Overcome challenges deep beneath the abandoned temple.
notes:
📍 [**Meepo**](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/5195096-kobold-warrior) guides the party through the kobold tunnels beneath the Sunless Citadel in search of **Calcryx**.

A faint **pulsing root-like growth** creeps through cracks in the masonry. The air carries a persistent sickly sweetness.

🎬 Meepo becomes increasingly **anxious** - hesitating and second-guessing his directions. *Meepo is lost again.*

- Kobold tunnels are **abandoned mid-use**, tools left behind as if fled *suddenly*.
- A broken **kobold shrine** appears vandalised with *shabby* goblin markings.

🧩 A **fork in the path**: one looks unstable and collapsing, the other is unfamiliar to Meepo. *You say go. Meepo go.*

- ⚠️ The unstable path is riddled with **skill challenges** to get through.
- ⚔️ The unfamiliar path leads to a [goblin](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/5195050-goblin-warrior) patrol who wants to kill **the beast**.

🎲 Impact:
- Lose **resources** - health or items.
- **Lost or trapped**.
- New **allies** with goblins.
- **Fight** to death.

👉 The party witnesses the impact of the *kobold–goblin conflict* on **Meepo**.

title: The Sunless Citadel
description: Gain Meepo's trust and secure safe passage into the citadel.
notes:
📍 The party arrives in **Oakhurst**, following rumours of a *mysterious healing fruit* hidden beneath the **Sunless Citadel**.

Locals speak in uneasy tones about *skirmishes* between **kobolds and goblins**, both claiming parts of the ruins as their own.

🎬 **Meepo**, a [kobold](https://www.dndbeyond.com/monsters/5195096-kobold-warrior), is nervous, eager to please, and desperate to regain his honour. *You help Meepo, Meepo help you.*

- Missing **Calcryx**, the tribe's **beloved pet** (a white dragon).
- Wants someone to **help recover** it in exchange for *safe passage*.
- Knows kobold tunnels are the **safest route** through goblin territory.
- Fears returning to the tribe in **disgrace**, especially while tensions with goblins grow.

🧩 Crude goblin **markings** scratched over kobold carvings - *signs of conflict*.

🎯 **Meepo** joins the party as an ally, guide, or useful contact, offering passage in exchange for **Calcryx**.

🎲 Alternatively:
- Kindness earns **loyalty**.
- Negotiation earns **cooperation**.
- Intimidation earns **fearful compliance**.
- Violence makes him **retreat and alert** his tribe.

👉 The party learns of **Calcryx**, senses the growing *kobold–goblin conflict*, and gains a reason to delve into the citadel.
